title: Village Ruins - 80% Abandoned Villages
description: Makes about 80% of vanilla villages spawn as zombie villages.
body:
![Savanna.Plains.Snowy.Desert.Taiga](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5005c489cb9c3b98eee21322e62b3843bdeffa25.jpeg)
This datapack converts roughly 80% of vanilla villages into abandoned zombie villages in plains, desert, savanna, snowy, and taiga biomes. It uses only vanilla worldgen template pools, so no mods are required, and it’s fully compatible with servers and modpacks. Perfect for making your worlds feel more dangerous, empty, and post-apocalyptic.
